allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('ascii_motion_card_v2.html', 'utf8'\); const match = html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*\)<\\/script>/\); if\(match\) { try { new Function\(match[1]\); console.log\('JS syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('JS ERROR:', e.message\); } }")
